case_title: KYLE DURFEE VS. 1219-1221-1223 NOE STREET HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION ET AL

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DURFEE, KYLE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT 1219-1221-1223 NOE STREET HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION HILL, CHRISTINE $3,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,090.00, 1219-1221-1223 NOE STREET HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION ONLY. SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-03-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-03-2023 BY JUDGE PRO TEM LYNN. PLAINTIFF KYLE DURFEE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT 1219-1221-1223 NOE STREET HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY CHRISTINE HILL. DEFENDANT 1219-1221-1223 NOE STREET HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY SARA JACOBSON VIA ZOOM, AND PAUL MELE ALSO VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT CHRISTINE HILL IS PRESENT. HONORABLE WILLIAM LYNN GAVE DISCLOSURE TO ALL PARTIES REGARDING PREVIOUS AFFILIATION WITH THE PROPERTY MANAGEMENT COMPANY. ALL PARTIES HAVE NO OBJECTIONS NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-03-2023 - JUDGMENT.
